level_signals: 4+ years of revenue operations or sales operations experience
Pay Grade J with base range up to $170K in high-cost states
Title is 'Lead', implying senior individual contributor ownership without direct reports stated

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 4+ years of revenue operations or sales operations experience with exposure to pipeline management, forecasting, and territory planning
Proficiency in Salesforce (experience as an administrator is a plus)
Hands-on experience with territory design — segmentation logic, account scoring, ownership routing, and managing transitions at scale
Experience designing and documenting end-to-end sales processes — stage definitions, SLAs, territory rules, and operating cadences

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Proficiency in Salesforce (experience as an administrator is a plus)

scope.surface: Mid-funnel sales lifecycle, territory planning, and partnership process governance across Sales, ISV, Strategic Partnerships, and Marketplace teams
scope.business_model: B2B merchant partnerships and B2C consumer lending (buy now, pay later)
core_responsibilities: Own mid-funnel sales lifecycle processes (Discovery → Close), including stage definitions, pipeline hygiene, forecasting inputs, and opportunity management standards
Drive territory planning, segmentation, account-to-rep mapping, ownership transitions, and ongoing territory hygiene
Lead process clarity and governance for ISV, Strategic Partnerships, and Marketplace motions, ensuring consistent execution and clean handoffs
Manage cross-functional initiatives end to end across Sales Leadership, Partnerships, Legal, Product, Analytics, and RevOps
Support forecasting accuracy and pipeline health by improving mid-funnel data quality and instrumentation
Own documentation and change management for all mid-funnel, territory, and partnerships processes
Partner with Business Systems on Salesforce workflows, opportunity layouts, territory rules, and GTM tooling improvements
Partner with Revenue Enablement to train teams on process changes, territory updates, and tooling adoption

compensation.equity_form: Equity Grade 5; ESPP (employee stock purchase plan at a discount)

green_flags: Compensation range explicitly disclosed (two-tier by geography)
Remote-first company with broad US remote eligibility
Clear ownership scope and well-defined mid-funnel responsibilities
Equity and strong benefits package (100% medical premium coverage) disclosed
red_flags: Visa sponsorship not mentioned — unclear for international candidates
No explicit mention of direct reports or team size
Salesforce admin listed as 'a plus' within the same bullet as a hard requirement, creating mild ambiguity about how critical admin-level skills are

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from title 'Lead', years requirement, and comp range — not explicitly stated as senior IC)
seniority.manages_people (not stated; assumed false as no direct reports mentioned)
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (inferred from responsibilities; not directly stated in JD)
scope.business_model (inferred from company description and revenue team context)
compensation.base_range_usd (stated as two-tier geographic ranges; reported as overall min/max spanning both bands)
ambiguities: Salesforce proficiency is listed as a must-have, but 'experience as an administrator is a plus' is embedded in the same bullet — treated proficiency as hard and admin experience as soft.
Compensation has two geographic tiers: $130K-$170K (CA, WA, NY, NJ, CT) and $115K-$155K (all other US states). base_range_usd reflects the full span ($115K-$170K).
Location metadata tag is #LI-Remote and JD body confirms remote-first; treated as remote-us. No cities tied to this role specifically.
